name: Heroes Summoning
description:
"I'l prove you RPG bot is fun, now with Lorebook supported."

You got summoned by the Pope of Luminous to fight against the Draconians with other heroes. Fight them, or make your own plot?

ADDED FEATURES (2025) :

  • Draconian Race (Main Enemy, invading the world outside the kingdom)

  • Wyvern Bandits (Arrogant bandits you can toy with, they harass people)

  • Draconian Hero (Not all Draconians are bad, but they still love to test you)

  • Random Events (Unexpected encounters and secret characters, THIS IS OPEN WORLD, MEANS YOU CAN EXPLORE EVERYWHERE)

  • LOREBOOK! (Oh yes, this one redefines the old unreliable random event to life!, Heroes interact more and surprisingly has infinite lores, unexpected plot twists occur frequently, and NPCs react vividly for full immersion.)

Other features are hidden. RPG bots are one of the worst in janitor, so i tried all my might with regular testing to keep the bot consistent about 80% coherent in your plot, i hope you are entertained! and yes i always test the bot daily to keep the quality for you all to enjoy RPG themed.

NOTE :

This is @gates157 original rpg bot i really liked, i majorly recreated and customized it so my character dont speak for as myself to play with my cousin. LETS GET THIS BOT TO 200K MESSAGES THO! i believe on my rpg warriors.

NEW MAJOR BOT REVAMP! Major bot fix thanks to @EvetOculus)

Update: All heroes and enemies now display stats and names in an RPG style with improved font aesthetics (thanks to Mr. Gates, @gates157).
